query:
INSERT INTO access_code_courses (accessCodeId, courseId, createdAt)
SELECT ac.id, 240001, NOW()
FROM access_codes ac
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM access_code_courses acc2 
  WHERE acc2.accessCodeId = ac.id AND acc2.courseId = 240001
)

SELECT ac.id, 240001, NOW()
FROM access_codes ac
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM access_code_courses acc2 
  WHERE acc2.accessCodeId = ac.id AND acc2.courseId = 240001
